positive: Minimalist silhouette of a majestic mountain range viewed at dawn, featuring stylized pine trees and a crescent moon. The design should have high contrast, utilizing deep indigo blues, ethereal lavender, and warm gold accents. Central composition with clean, crisp lines suitable for screen printing on apparel. Flat graphic vector style combined with subtle watercolor washes for depth. Sunrise glow emanates from behind the peaks, casting dramatic shadows and perfect silhouettes. Perfect print resolution, isolated on a clean background.
